scores.correctness_notes: Core API usage (juju.run, Task attributes like success/results/stdout/stderr/return_code/status) is correct. Missing Task attributes from gold standard: message, log, id. Also misrepresents error handling — gold standard says juju.run() itself raises TaskError automatically on failure; the response attributes this to a separate raise_on_failure() method instead.
scores.hallucination_notes: task.raise_on_failure() is not present in the gold standard and appears fabricated. The gold standard explicitly states juju.run() raises TaskError directly if the action failed, with no mention of a raise_on_failure() method on the Task object.
